channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A 'Shark Tank' alum needed cash to pay tariffs. This shadowy lending world was ready
item.description: How about $350,000 within hours? The pitches flood small businesses: "No hidden fees, No BS." These financial lifelines are barely regulated and can t...

item.title: Four top U.S. speedskaters to watch at the Olympics
item.description: U.S. speed skaters set to compete in Milan are drawing comparisons to past greats like Eric Heiden, Bonnie Blair, and Apolo Ohno. Here are four to wat...

item.title: Need a new path in midlife? There's a school for that and a quiz to kickstart it
item.description: Schools across the country are offering courses and retreats for people 50+ who want to reinvent themselves and embrace lifelong learning and discover...

item.title: U.S. skater Connor McDermott-Mostowy joins record number of out LGBTQ Winter Olympians
item.description: When U.S. speedskater Connor McDermott-Mostowy makes his Winter Olympic debut in Milan, he'll join a record number of out LGBTQ athletes. But of the 4...

item.title: 5 glaring warning signs for Republicans in this year's midterm elections
item.description: Here's why Republicans are facing an uphill battle, particularly for retaining control of the House.

item.title: Trial against Meta in New Mexico focuses on dangers of child sexual exploitation on social media
Migrants languish in US detention centers facing dire conditions and prolonged waits
item.description: Prolonged detention has become more common in President Donald Trump’s second term, at least partly because a new policy generally prohibits immigrati...

item.title: Okay, I’m slightly less mad about that ‘Magnificent Ambersons’ AI project
item.description: But this is still a bad idea.

item.title: San Francisco’s pro-billionaire march draws dozens
item.description: A march supporting California’s billionaires didn’t exactly draw a huge crowd on Saturday.

item.title: Investigation continues a week after Savannah Guthrie mother was reported missing
TechCrunch Mobility: Is $16B enough to build a profitable robotaxi business?
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: Crypto.com places $70M bet on AI.com domain ahead of Super Bowl
item.description: The purchase rewrites the domain record books -- not that the crypto industry has ever been accused of restraint when it comes to spending.

item.title: Amazon’s ‘Melania’ documentary stumbles in second weekend
item.description: After a better-than-expected opening weekend in theaters, box office for Amazon’s “Melania”fell 67%.

item.title: California Governor Gavin Newsom Calls For the State to Implement Its Own Institutional Investor Ban
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom has rarely been in lockstep with the federal government recently, but they agree on one issue: stopping corporate inv...

item.title: No Money? Creative Ways to Fund Your Next Rental Property (Rookie Reply)
item.description: Money. It’s the first BIG hurdle every rookie faces when buying a rental property. Can’t put 20% down? Maybe you don’t need to! Welcome to another Roo...

item.title: The 7 Places Self-Managing Landlords Lose Money Without Realizing It

item.title: A Fast-Growing Renter Demographic is Creating Better Cash Flow Opportunities For Investors

item.title: Renting vs. Buying a House: How to Get Wealthier with Either Decision
